meaning: adj.脂肪的,含脂肪的,脂肪状的,[医]脂肪过多n.胖子
examples: I'm trying to keep off fatty foods.
They eat too many fatty and sugary foods, but they are not eating enough to be fat.
This special fatty tissue, the only other place is found in the dolphin, is in the lower jaw.
The best ones carry an edge of acidity that cuts through butter or batter or fatty burger.
Peranakan-style black fatty pork... meat-stuffed cabbage... beef curry... fried yellow noodles... pork and rice sausages...
